subject: An interior view of a decayed or abandoned building — cracked concrete walls, broken flooring, dim fluorescent lighting, and debris scattered throughout
description: The card depicts the interior of a ruined or decaying structure — cracked and stained concrete walls, partially collapsed flooring, and dim overhead fluorescent lighting that casts a cold, clinical glow over the debris. The space feels like an abandoned industrial or institutional building: something between a factory floor and a corridor. No figures are present. The overall mood is cold, hazardous, and desolate. The Pokémon TCG Stadium card frame contextualizes this as a dangerous battlefield location.
foreground: Cracked concrete floor with debris and rubble
background: Crumbling concrete walls under dim fluorescent lighting
